name: Food Aquaculture
description: Exclude research on commercial food aquaculture (salmon, tilapia, edible shrimp).

name: Commercial Fisheries
description: Exclude research on commercial fishing, trawling, and fishery stock management.

name: Marine Mammals
description: Exclude whales, dolphins, seals, and other marine mammals.

name: Macro-Policy & Climate
description: Exclude broad climate policy, ocean acidification modeling, and macro-level greenhouse gas research.

name: Terrestrial Livestock
description: Exclude cattle, pigs, poultry, and general veterinary science unrelated to fish.
